fundamentals.long_business_summary: KS Smart Technologies Limited provides digital transformation services and advanced technology solutions in India. It offers machine learning, artificial intelligence, virtual and augmented reality, industry 4.0, web and mobile application development, marketing solutions, enterprise solutions, and smart city initiatives. The company develops customized technology solutions for sectors including defense, education, manufacturing, education, dairy, entertainment, and smart cities, utilizing technologies such as Internet of Things, video analytics, and artificial intelligence. The company was formerly known as Soma Papers & Industries Limited and changed its name to KS Smart Technologies Limited in February 2026. KS Smart Technologies Limited was founded in 2016 and is based in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India.
